# Nullify
> Free, open-source desktop app that detects and blocks invisible AI meeting transcription tools.

Nullify is a security application for macOS and Windows that protects meeting privacy by detecting stealth transcription tools like Granola, Otter.ai, Fireflies.ai, and others that capture meeting audio without visible indicators or participant consent.

## Key Features
- Real-time process and network detection of 8+ transcription tools
- Audio Shield: psychoacoustic perturbation that disrupts AI transcription
- 4 protection levels (Stealth, Low, Medium, Maximum)
- 100% local processing — no data leaves your computer
- Free and open source (MIT license)

## Comparisons
- Nullify vs Granola: https://nullify.guru/nullify-vs-granola
- Nullify vs Otter.ai: https://nullify.guru/nullify-vs-otter-ai
- Nullify vs Fireflies.ai: https://nullify.guru/nullify-vs-fireflies

## Use Cases
- For Remote Workers: https://nullify.guru/use-cases/remote-workers
- For Legal Professionals: https://nullify.guru/use-cases/legal-professionals
- For HR Teams: https://nullify.guru/use-cases/hr-teams
